name: My Sort of Cheat but Small Fry Female Character
translation-context:
Title: 女キャラで異世界転移してチートっぽいけど雑魚キャラなので目立たず平和な庶民を目指します！ Translate as: I Transferred to Another World as a Female Character and Seem Kind of Cheat-Like, But I'm Small Fry, So I'll Aim to Be an Unremarkable, Peaceful Commoner!

Premise: The protagonist wakes up in a vast forest after apparently falling asleep while playing an online game. They are now their female game character, Suzy, in another world. The character seems cheat-like and overpowered, but the protagonist remembers being low-level/small fry and wants to live quietly without standing out. Despite trying to hold back, Suzy often overdoes things. Early parts focus on rural frontier life; later parts move into a city academy setting.

Name guidance: スージィ = Suzy. Keep Suzy consistent. Translate 女キャラ as female character, 異世界転移 as otherworld transfer / transferred to another world, チート as cheat-like/overpowered depending on tone, 雑魚キャラ as small fry/weak character, 庶民 as commoner, 魔獣 as magical beast, 魔物 as monster, and 学園 as academy.

Tone/style: comedic isekai with game-avatar transfer, gender-bending/mental feminization elements, overpowered protagonist who wants a quiet commoner life, rural life, academy life, and misunderstandings between Suzy's self-image and how others see her. Keep the protagonist's flustered, lively, slightly older-male-memory-in-a-girl-body voice.
